prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOBCP-SML-RD-2 Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Metal Detector Non-Metallic Brass Coin Probe for Metal Detecting Treasure Hunting Hand Tool Description: Treasure Hunt like a pro with the ASR Outdoor Brass Coin Probe.

This handy tool is designed to pinpoint your findings once your metal detector alerts you of the treasure. Once you've found the spot, use a small digging tool to dig a plug and remove the plug. Then you should re-scan the area with your detector to make sure the treasure was not in the plug you removed. Then use your brass coin probe to slowly probe the small hole you created.

This tool is ideal for hunting treasure because brass is non-marring, so you won't ruin the artifact, metal or coin you're searching for. This probe is 9.5" in length, has a rod size of 6.25" and is 5mm thick, so it's easy to carry and store when not in use. Make sure you grab one of these before your next treasure hunt. Search Terms: non magnetic titanium metal detector accessories probe tools search zone waterproof coil beachcomber beachcombing gold prospecting mining treasure hunting finders essential Features: - NON-METALLIC PROBE: Never get false positive readings while examining your search zone; made from premium non-marring brass you wont ruin the artifact, metal, or coin you're hunting for - COMFORTABLE HANDLE: Easy to hold upward or downward, the ergonomic rubber grip handle will help elevate strain to your hand during extended use - METAL DETECTING TOOL: Probes are an essential tool for metal detection. You can use the probe to pinpoint your findings once your metal detector alerts you to your find - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: The probe is made of durable, heavy-duty brass with a rubber handle that won’t rust or dull even after many uses - METAL DETECTOR PROBE SPECIFICATIONS: Overall length: 9.5 inches; Brass rod: 6.25 inches; Thickness: 5mm; Handle material: rubber; Probe material: non-magnetic brass === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Brass Coin Probe Metal Detector Tool

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Non-Metallic Brass Coin Probe Metal Detector Tool

anthropic.title_differentiation: Non-Magnetic Brass, Non-Marring, Ergonomic Rubber Grip, 95 Inch, Treasure Hunting Essential

openai.title_differentiation: Non-Marring Brass, Rubber Grip Handle, False Positive Free, 95-Inch Length, Durable Rust-Resistant Design
